introSection: Serpentikah is a steel inverted roller coaster currently located at Aztlán Parque Urbano in Mexico City, Distrito Federal, Mexico. It is designed by Vekoma. The ride includes a dark ride section before the lift hill.
fullText: Serpentikah is a steel inverted roller coaster currently located at Aztlán Parque Urbano in Mexico City, Distrito Federal, Mexico. It is designed by Vekoma. The ride includes a dark ride section before the lift hill.
